blocked_until_configured: SQLite database file path, migration rollout, better-sqlite3 install, and tenant authorization
Instant app id, hosted rules, auth policy, realtime transport, and storage/stream runtime proof
Supabase project URL, publishable key, RLS migration, auth redirect allow-list, and hosted read/write/realtime proof
Production tRPC auth context, transport/subscription policy, request limits, durable event storage, and observability
honesty_notes: The default template owns editable Database + API source and a local readiness route.
Current cache-manifest counts come from package-status cache.manifests, and the live physical cache now matches that current set.
Older cache manifests are archived outside .dx/forge/cache and are not launch package-count proof.
This receipt is not live SQLite, InstantDB, Supabase, or production tRPC runtime proof.
Database ORM has its own runtime-gated readiness route; it validates local database config acknowledgements only and does not open SQLite, run migrations, or query data.

Realtime App Database has its own provider-gated readiness route; it validates local InstantDB config only and does not create a hosted route handler, connect to realtime transport, or claim storage/stream proof.
Supabase has its own provider-gated readiness route; it performs local config validation only and does not claim hosted runtime proof.

Type-Safe API has a local /api/trpc/health route that returns Response JSON for template readiness and launchEvent dry-runs without live transport, subscriptions, persistence, or provider runtime proof.
